MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Vacated

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee)is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2010 Set For Trial On Jan-18-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-29-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501

Amended Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment Against Deft Kun Sam Kim
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Ivo Keller, Esq., and Richard C. Darwin, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: NARA BANK
Jon F. Reynolds, Jr., Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: KUN SAM KIM

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified on PLAINTIFF NARA BANK's Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Kun Sam Kim is granted in the amount of $1,097,256.00 The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.
The Claim of Exemption is Granted as:
- The residence, subject to any Homestead exemption that might exist
- Vehicle
- Item 5
Claims of exemption denied as to items 2, 3, and 4
Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
